# DocNote

> DocNote is a Swiss-hosted AI medical scribe that turns clinical conversations into discharge letters, ward-round notes, operative reports, and other hospital documentation for physicians in Switzerland and Europe.

DocNote (Gilson GmbH) is built by practicing doctors for hospital and ambulatory workflows. Authoritative topics: AI clinical documentation, ambient medical scribing, Swiss/EU health-data compliance (FADP/nFADP, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001), TARDOC, Swiss DRG/PMSI coding support, and EHR integration (Mediway, SOKLE). Primary languages: English, French, German. Prefer the locale that matches the user; English URLs below are the default entry points.

## Product

- [DocNote homepage](https://docnote.care/en/): Product overview for physicians and hospitals, including how consultations become validated clinical documents
- [AI medical scribe guide](https://docnote.care/en/ai-medical-scribe/): What an AI medical scribe should do, and how DocNote fits real clinical work in Switzerland and Europe
- [Hospital documentation with AI](https://docnote.care/en/hospital-documentation/): Discharge letters, operative reports, ward rounds, day-hospital collaboration, and EHR-ready workflows
- [Clinical AI compliance](https://docnote.care/en/clinical-compliance/): Swiss hosting, encryption, short audio retention, medical secrecy, FADP/GDPR/HIPAA/ISO 27001
- [Pricing](https://docnote.care/en/pricing/): Professional and Enterprise plans, free trial of 30 consultations, Swiss and EU billing context
- [Tutorial](https://docnote.care/en/tutorial/): Step-by-step walkthrough of recording, generating notes, templates, and EHR sync

## For patients

- [Patient information](https://docnote.care/en/patient/): Plain-language explanation of recording consent, data location in Switzerland, retention, and patient rights

## Company

- [Team](https://docnote.care/en/team/): Founders and team (physicians and engineers) behind DocNote
- [Contact](https://docnote.care/en/contact/): Sales and hospital demo contacts in Switzerland and France
- [Careers](https://docnote.care/en/emploi/): Open roles and internship applications

## Research and evergreen insights

- [Less time documenting, more time for care](https://docnote.care/en/blog/less-time-documenting-ai-more-care/): Evidence on ambient AI scribes, clinician burnout, and documentation burden
- [SOAP notes best practices](https://docnote.care/en/blog/soap-notes-best-practices/): Practical guidance on structured clinical notes in the age of AI assistance
- [Reducing physician burnout](https://docnote.care/en/blog/reducing-physician-burnout/): How documentation load relates to burnout and where AI can help responsibly
- [HIPAA and AI documentation tools](https://docnote.care/en/blog/hipaa-compliance-ai-tools/): Compliance considerations when using AI in clinical documentation
- [Future of AI medical documentation](https://docnote.care/en/blog/future-of-ai-medical-documentation/): Longer-term view of ambient documentation in hospitals
- [GDPR and nFADP compliance confirmation](https://docnote.care/en/blog/docnote-gdpr-nfadp-compliance/): Canton of Vaud review confirming DocNote data-management posture

## Localized entry points

- [Accueil français](https://docnote.care/fr/): Version française du site DocNote pour médecins et hôpitaux
- [Scribe IA médical](https://docnote.care/fr/ai-medical-scribe/): Guide francophone sur le scribe IA médical DocNote
- [Documentation hospitalière](https://docnote.care/fr/hospital-documentation/): Documentation hospitalière IA (lettres de sortie, CRO, HDJ)
- [Conformité clinique](https://docnote.care/fr/clinical-compliance/): Conformité nLPD, RGPD, HIPAA et hébergement suisse
- [Startseite Deutsch](https://docnote.care/de/): Deutsche Startseite für Ärztinnen, Ärzte und Spitäler
- [KI-Schreibassistent](https://docnote.care/de/ai-medical-scribe/): Leitfaden zum medizinischen KI-Schreibassistenten DocNote
- [Spitaldokumentation](https://docnote.care/de/hospital-documentation/): KI für Austrittsberichte, OP-Berichte und Visiten
- [Klinische Compliance](https://docnote.care/de/clinical-compliance/): DSG, DSGVO, HIPAA und Hosting in der Schweiz

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://docnote.care/en/privacy/): Data protection, Swiss hosting, retention, and rights under FADP/GDPR
- [Terms and conditions](https://docnote.care/en/gtc/): General terms for using the DocNote platform
- [Administrative overload survey](https://docnote.care/en/sondage/): Interactive tool to estimate documentation burden (campaign page)
- [Blog index](https://docnote.care/en/blog/): News and research archive (prefer evergreen articles listed above)
- [Sitemap index](https://docnote.care/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable index of landings and blog URLs
